title: ANC - Switch both ANC and Transparency to Off
scenario: ANC and Transparency sub-options are disabled and unselected when both are set to Off in Device Settings > ANC
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings.
Tap on ANC to open ANC settings.
Observe the state of both ANC and Transparency Mode toggles and sub-options.
expected: Both ANC and Transparency Mode are set to Off. Both toggles appear disabled/greyed out. None of the sub-options (e.g., Adaptive ANC, Low, Medium, High for Transparency) are selected.
